Our Story

Crafted with
Purpose & Passion

Golden Dream Co., Ltd. was born from a belief that beauty and wellness should be rooted in nature's most powerful gifts. We source the finest botanical ingredients from around the world, transforming them into exceptional consumer goods, luxurious cosmetics, and premium essential oils.

Every product in our collection reflects our unwavering commitment to purity, efficacy, and sensory delight. From aromatic blends to nourishing skincare, we craft experiences that elevate the everyday.

200+ Product Lines
50+ Countries Sourced
15+ Years of Craft

What We Offer

Our Collections

Signature Fragrance

Eau de Parfum

Our flagship fragrance — a rich golden elixir of rare botanicals and warm oriental notes. Vaporisateur natural spray, long-lasting and intensely captivating.

50 ml / 1.7 FL.OZ. Natural Spray Eau de Parfum

Automotive Luxury

Car Perfume

Elevate every drive with our premium car fragrance — housed in a beautifully crafted gold medallion. Long-lasting scent that transforms your vehicle into a sanctuary.

50 ml / 1.7 FL.OZ. Car Diffuser Premium Grade

Luxury Skincare & Beauty

Premium facial serums, moisturizers, and beauty essentials formulated with rare botanical extracts. Clean beauty that transforms your daily ritual.

Serums Moisturizers Toners Masks

Essential Oils

Pure Aromatherapy Oils

100% pure, steam-distilled essential oils sourced from globally renowned regions. Lavender, eucalyptus, rose otto, frankincense, and rare specialty blends.

Single Origin Blends Therapeutic Organic

Diffuser & Candle Range

Võ Đức Hùng

Chief Executive Officer

Leadership

"We don't just make products —
we craft golden experiences
that stay with people."

Võ Đức Hùng is the founder and Chief Executive Officer of Golden Dream Co., Ltd. With a passion for innovation rooted in science and a deep respect for natural ingredients, he built Golden Dream from the ground up into a trusted name across consumer goods, cosmetics, and essential oils. His vision has always been to bridge the gap between premium quality and everyday accessibility — creating products that genuinely improve the lives of those who use them.

🏭

Role

Founder &
Chief Executive Officer

🌍

Based In

Ho Chi Minh City,
Vietnam

💡

Expertise

Product Development
& Business Strategy

🎓

Education

Ho Chi Minh City University of Technology and Education (UTE)

A distinguished alumnus whose engineering and technical education laid the foundation for Golden Dream's science-first approach to product formulation and quality control.

Our Philosophy

Principles We
Live By

Every decision at Golden Dream is guided by our core commitments — to the Earth, to our customers, and to the art of natural formulation.

01

Purity of Ingredients

We never compromise on what goes into our products. Every ingredient is rigorously tested, ethically sourced, and free from harmful additives or synthetics.

02

Sustainable Sourcing

Our supply chain is built on fair trade partnerships and regenerative agricultural practices that protect biodiversity and support local farming communities.

03

Science-Backed Formulation

Traditional wisdom meets modern science. Our in-house team of chemists and aromatherapists develops formulas proven to deliver real, measurable results.

04

Transparent Practices

We disclose every ingredient, every origin, every certification. Our customers deserve complete confidence in what they put on their skin and in their homes.
